outlook_paragraph: SM shows zero active drilling sites at decision date, with no newly or continuously active pads and a sharp negative relative activity delta of -3.0, indicating a near-term halt in drilling momentum heading into Q4 2020. With WTI averaging around $46.74 and realized prices discounted at 88% of benchmark, revenue is further constrained by only 55% exposure to the most active segment. These factors collectively underpin the deterministic revenue forecast of $321.3M, reflecting limited operational activity and moderate price conditions.
